name: United Parcel Service, Inc.
description: United Parcel Service, Inc. (UPS) is a prominent American multinational shipping, receiving, and supply chain management company headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia. Founded in 1907, it has evolved from a local messenger service into a global logistics leader. The company provides a comprehensive range of services, including package delivery, freight transportation, and specialized logistics solutions for businesses of all sizes. UPS operates one of the world's largest airline fleets and a vast ground transportation network, facilitating international commerce and supply chain efficiency through its extensive global infrastructure and advanced tracking technologies.
